response.text:
Exact verification is incomplete for the badge type switch to Harmonics.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Insufficient source-of-truth verification to emit an applyable harmonics power flow.","findings":["Verified commands exist for POWer:ADDNew, harmonics source/setup subcommands, and harmonics result queries using the \"harmonics\" selector.","The required command value to change a newly added power badge from its default type to a Harmonics measurement was not explicitly verified in the retrieved results.","Without a verified POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe setting for Harmonics, emitting setup writes would risk producing a non-applyable flow."],"suggestedFixes":["Verify the allowed enumeration for POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe and confirm the exact value for Harmonics before building the flow.","Once that type value is verified, a compact pyvisa flow can be emitted using POWer:ADDNew \"POWER1\", the verified HARMONICS:* source/setup commands, and verified POWer:POWer1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:*? \"harmonics\" queries."],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: Insufficient source-of-truth verification to emit an applyable harmonics power flow.
findings: Verified commands exist for POWer:ADDNew, harmonics source/setup subcommands, and harmonics result queries using the "harmonics" selector.
The required command value to change a newly added power badge from its default type to a Harmonics measurement was not explicitly verified in the retrieved results.
Without a verified POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe setting for Harmonics, emitting setup writes would risk producing a non-applyable flow.
suggestedFixes: Verify the allowed enumeration for POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe and confirm the exact value for Harmonics before building the flow.

Once that type value is verified, a compact pyvisa flow can be emitted using POWer:ADDNew "POWER1", the verified HARMONICS:* source/setup commands, and verified POWer:POWer1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:*? "harmonics" queries.
